top_signals.title: Sen. Lindsey Graham, influential lawmaker and Trump ally,  dies at 71 after a brief illness
top_signals.summary: Graham, a prominent Republican senator from South Carolina, had just returned from a trip to Ukraine.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Resurgent U.S.-Iran hostilities send bitcoin lower even as ETF flows show demand
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: EU sanctions Russian GRU military hackers over cyberattacks
top_signals.summary: The European Union and the United Kingdom jointly sanctioned dozens of Russian individuals and entities and accused Russia of coordinating a network of hacking groups responsible for attacks across Europe. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ‘Almost unlimited’: Execs says AI demand remains strong even as enterprises move to ‘valuemaxxing’
top_signals.summary: AI-related chip stocks have been volatile amid a debate over AI demand and spending.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Uruguay’s Offshore Oil Province Could Be Bigger Than Vaca Muerta
top_signals.summary: Companies are gearing up for exploration drilling in deepwater blocks offshore Uruguay in the hope that the South Atlantic margin offshore South America could hold a lot of oil, similar to the recent discoveries offshore Namibia in Africa.   Uruguay, with a limited exploration drilling history of three wells spudded, all dry, has attracted the interest of many international companies that look to find the next billion-barrel oil province. Companies including Shell, Chevron, Eni, APA, QatarEnergy, and Argentina’s YPF have acquired the…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
